episodes.title: Cult Explosion (1980)
episodes.description:
Classic "Christian scare" film delves into the cultic milieu of the Moonies, the Mormons, Hare Krishnas, Transcendental Meditation, and "Black Muslems" among others, presenting the expertise of Dr. Walter Martin, Eldridge Cleaver, and Brooks Alexander.

Based on the book by David Hunt, this is a Jeremiah Films release, distributed by New Liberty Enterprises.

Features some brief, disturbing Jonestown footage!
subjects: The Church Of Jesus Christ Of Latter-Day Saints
